title: Programming Languages: Developer Demand & Community Size
content:
Programming Languages: Developer Demand & Community Size
========================================================

Question volume on Stack Overflow is a reliable proxy for the size of the active developer community. GitHub repository counts indicate the breadth of open-source adoption.

title: AI & Machine Learning Technologies: Market Demand 2025
content:
AI & Machine Learning Technologies: Market Demand 2025
======================================================

AI/ML has the fastest-growing developer community of any technology domain. Demand for AI engineering roles increased by 35вҖ“40% YoY across major job boards.

title: Cloud & DevOps Technologies: Adoption and Hiring Demand
content:
Cloud & DevOps Technologies: Adoption and Hiring Demand

title: Database Technologies: Developer Adoption Trends
content:
Database Technologies: Developer Adoption Trends
================================================

SQL remains the most universally required data skill. PostgreSQL has overtaken MySQL as the preferred open-source RDBMS. Vector databases (pgvector, Pinecone, Weaviate) are growing fastest due to AI/RAG workloads.

title: Backend Frameworks & APIs: Hiring and Community Trends
content:

title: Data Engineering & Analytics Platform Trends
content:
Data Engineering & Analytics Platform Trends
============================================

title: Cybersecurity Technologies: Skills in Demand
content:
Cybersecurity Technologies: Skills in Demand
============================================

Cybersecurity roles have one of the lowest unemployment rates in tech (<1%). Zero-trust architecture and cloud security skills are the highest-growth specialisations. SIEM/SOAR platform experience commands a 20вҖ“25% salary premium.

title: United States вҖ” Finance & Insurance: Industry Salary Context (BLS OES 2024)
content:
United States вҖ” Finance & Insurance: Industry Salary Context (BLS OES 2024)
======================================================================

Sector: NAICS 52 вҖ” Finance and Insurance

Covers banking (NAICS 5221/5222), investment management (5231), insurance carriers (5241), and financial advisors (5242). High-earning sector; Wall Street bonuses can 2вҖ“3Г— base salaries. Top roles: investment bankers, quant analysts, portfolio managers, actuaries, risk analysts.

title: United States вҖ” Management Consulting: Industry Salary Context (BLS OES 2024)
content:
United States вҖ” Management Consulting: Industry Salary Context (BLS OES 2024)
======================================================================

Sector: NAICS 5416 вҖ” Management, Scientific, and Technical Consulting

NAICS 5416 = Management, Scientific, and Technical Consulting Services. Covers strategy consulting (McKinsey, Bain, BCG), IT consulting (Accenture, Deloitte), and engineering consulting. Top roles: management consultants, strategy analysts, project managers, business analysts.

title: United States вҖ” Pharmaceuticals & Biotech: Industry Salary Context (BLS OES 2024)
content:
United States вҖ” Pharmaceuticals & Biotech: Industry Salary Context (BLS OES 2024)
======================================================================

Sector: NAICS 3254 вҖ” Pharmaceutical and Medicine Manufacturing

NAICS 3254 = Pharmaceutical and Medicine Manufacturing. Covers drug discovery, clinical trials, regulatory affairs, and manufacturing at companies like Pfizer, Merck, Johnson & Johnson, Moderna. Top roles: chemists, biologists, regulatory specialists, clinical research managers, data scientists.

content:
United States вҖ” Health Care & Social Assistance: Industry Salary Context (BLS OES 2024)
======================================================================

Sector: NAICS 62 вҖ” Health Care and Social Assistance

NAICS 62 = Healthcare and Social Assistance вҖ” the largest US employment sector. Covers hospitals, ambulatory care, nursing facilities, and social services. Top roles: physicians, surgeons, registered nurses, health services managers, medical coders.

content:
United States вҖ” Software Publishing: Industry Salary Context (BLS OES 2024)

Sector: NAICS 5112 вҖ” Software Publishers

NAICS 5112 = Software Publishers вҖ” covers packaged software and SaaS companies including Microsoft, Adobe, Salesforce, Oracle, and thousands of ISVs. Highest-paying sub-sector within tech. Top roles: software engineers, product managers, UX designers, DevOps, data scientists.

content:
United States вҖ” Data Processing & Cloud: Industry Salary Context (BLS OES 2024)
